jsonLd.title: Principal Investment Banker at Scripbox
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox:
Scripbox is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox!
